$comment: Mobile Menu Item Navbar Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Menu Item Navbar component used in mobile navigation bars. Supports platform-specific variants (iOS/Android), selection states (default/selected), selection types (with background/without background), optional badges, optional borders (top/bottom/none), and optional label visibility. Figma Reference: Node ID 71-5030

$component.name: Menu Item Navbar
$component.description: A mobile navigation component that displays menu items in a navigation bar. Supports platform-specific designs (iOS pill-shaped container vs Android square container), selection states with optional icon backgrounds, optional badge indicators, optional border indicators (top or bottom), and optional label visibility. Used for primary navigation in mobile apps.
$component.structure: Container with platform-specific border radius (iOS: pill-shaped, Android: square), padding, and optional borders. Contains icon container (32px) with icon (24px), optional badge positioned on icon, and optional label text below icon. Gap between icon and label.

sizes.ios: 71px height - iOS platform with pill-shaped container (100px border radius)
sizes.android: Variable height - Android platform with square container (no border radius)

platform.ios: iOS platform design with pill-shaped container (100px border radius), 71px height
platform.android: Android platform design with square container (no border radius), variable height

selected.default: Not selected state - gray icon and text, transparent background
selected.selected: Selected state - blue icon and text, optional icon background, optional border indicator

selection-type.with-bg: Selected state with icon background - blue background (#d1e0ff) on icon container, 6px border radius
selection-type.without-bg: Selected state without icon background - transparent icon container background

border.top: Top border indicator - 2px primary blue border at top of container
border.bottom: Bottom border indicator - 2px primary blue border at bottom of container

badge.present: Badge indicator positioned on icon - 18px height, 6px horizontal padding, 9px border radius

usage.contexts: Mobile navigation bars, bottom navigation, tab bars, primary navigation menus, mobile app navigation
usage.features: Platform-specific designs (iOS/Android), Selection states, Optional icon backgrounds, Badge indicators, Border indicators (top/bottom), Optional label visibility, Icon-only variants
